content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Amendment fr-1-c26197c2 is factually incorrect. I verified that commit ce04dcc7 does modify flake.nix, adding pkgs.procps and pkgs.util-linux to both nativeCheckInputs and devShells.default.packages. The amendment appears to have only examined the uncommitted working tree diff (which only contains orchestration metadata changes) rather than the full committed change set. The planner's position to reject this amendment is well-supported by the evidence.

## Votes

- `fr-1-c26197c2`: Reject
  Verified via `git show ce04dcc7 -- flake.nix`: the checkpoint commit contains the flake.nix fix, adding pkgs.procps and pkgs.util-linux to both nativeCheckInputs and devShell packages. The amendment's claim that 'no build/test file is modified' is false — it only examined the uncommitted diff (orchestration metadata), not the committed change set which includes the substantive fix.
